Our Trainers

Home Trainers
Expert Gym Coaching

Meet The Lifestyle Reset Trainers

Our gym trainers bring together deep experience, structured coaching, and a motivating environment that helps members build real strength, confidence, and long-term discipline.

Coaching Team

Gym Trainer 01 & 02

Personalized support at 6th Avenue Commercial Plaza, LDA Avenue 01, 2nd Floor.

Gym Trainer 01

Shahid Adnan

Senior coach with a strong foundation in strength development, disciplined programming, and long-term member transformation.

Experience 16 Years

Location

Elite Strength Coach

Energetic gym coach delivering practical guidance, focused support, and consistent motivation for members building their routine.

Experience 3 Years
Phone 0323-4222747
Location

6th Avenue Commercial Plaza LDA Avenue 01 2nd Floor

Performance Support Coach
Why Members Trust Them

Coaching That Feels Personal

  • Structured training guidance for all fitness levels
  • Clear communication, motivation, and form correction
  • On-floor coaching in a focused, high-energy environment
Train With Confidence

Professional Support For Real Progress

Whether you are just getting started or looking to sharpen your routine, our trainers help you stay consistent with focused instruction, encouragement, and accountability.

Every session is designed to keep your training purposeful, safe, and effective so you can move toward your goals with confidence.

LIFESTYLE RESET

"Lifestyle Reset Gym is where focus, strength, and transformation come together to build your best self."
